rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Gov't Code §2306.1093 governs terms of council members and is wholly unrelated.
quote: Sec. 2306.1093. TERMS. (a) A member of the council who represents a state agency serves at the pleasure of the head of that agency.
_note: No relationship between proposed change and this rule.
